title: She's a Killer Queen
overview: The girl who became a ray of light illuminating upon this chaotic internet of today... OMGkawaiiAngel. While the sensational KAngel's actions stir public opinion, the up-and-coming streaming group Karamazov keeps an eye on her. Meanwhile, Kache heads to work at a theme café. Here, a brand-new story about the Internet Angel begins.

title: Just the Two of Us
overview: Karamazov and AngeliKa perform live together, but things aren’t as perfect as they seem.

title: INTERNET OVERDOSE
overview: When asked about the thoughts behind "INTERNET OVERDOSE," the girl reminisces. Memories of childhood, the words thrown at her: “What happens when people die?” This is the story of the passing days of a single girl.

title: London Calling
overview: Kache lives an ordinary life, while Michica deviates from the ordinary. Once, the two spent time together in the same space. The words they exchanged in middle school echo. And now, in reality, Kache is living with her freeloader boyfriend. What will Kache, living like an ordinary person, choose?

title: Whatever
overview: As Karamazov’s first live performance, “Crime and Punishment,” draws near, Kache, who has broken up with her freeloader boyfriend, heads to an apparel shop with the members of Karamazov. Then, in the city at night, the figure of a lone girl appears.
